core_principles: Trust through Clarity: Generous whitespace, clear typography, no clutter.
Conservative Modernity: Traditional values (blue/white) presented with modern precision (clean lines, subtle shadows).
Content First: The expertise must shine. Design supports the content, doesn't overshadow it.
design_philosophy.target_audience: Business owners, Entrepreneurs, MSMEs seeking expert financial guidance.

layout_strategies.mega_menu: grid grid-cols-12 gap-8 p-6 bg-white shadow-xl border-t border-slate-100

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 font-semibold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary/20 hover:bg-primary/5 hover:border-primary/40 transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors duration-200 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.service: group bg-white p-8 rounded-lg border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

key_messages: Decades of Experience in Financial Excellence
Strategic Growth Partners, Not Just Accountants

implementation_steps: 1. Setup Color Palette in tailwind.config.js (Primary: Blue-900, Secondary: Blue-600, Accent: Blue-50)
3. Create Layout Component (Sticky Header with Mega Menu, Footer)
5. Implement Home Page (Hero -> About Preview -> Services Grid -> Testimonials -> CTA)
6. Implement Services Page (Overview + 8 Detail Pages routing)
9. Add SEO Meta Tags to all pages

accessibility_guidelines.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 is only used on white backgrounds. Use text-slate-600 for better readability.
accessibility_guidelines.interactive: All interactive elements must have visible focus states (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2).
accessibility_guidelines.aria: Mega menu must use proper aria-expanded and aria-controls attributes.

testing_requirements.data_testid: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) must have a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'submit-contact-form', 'nav-link-services').

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic center alignment for long text.
Avoid 'AI Slop' by using specific, high-quality copy, not generic placeholders.
Ensure the 'Resources' section handles loading states gracefully.
Mobile menu must be a Sheet component from Shadcn/UI.
Use 'sonner' for form submission success/error toasts.
